# Spray Liquid Green

> Spray foam insulation installer serving New York, Connecticut, New Jersey, and offering franchise territories nationwide. Open cell and closed cell spray foam for residential and commercial. Headquarters: 473 Rt 164, Brewster, NY 10509. Phone: 845-787-FOAM (3626). Email: info@sprayliquidgreen.com. Founded 2010.

## Core Pages
- [Home](https://sprayliquidgreen.com/): Spray foam insulation overview, hero, services intro
- [About](https://sprayliquidgreen.com/about): Company history, mission, team, "Got Foam?" tagline
- [Products](https://sprayliquidgreen.com/products): Open cell and closed cell spray foam details
- [Industries](https://sprayliquidgreen.com/industries): Residential, commercial, agricultural, industrial, institutional
- [Why Liquid Green](https://sprayliquidgreen.com/why-spray-liquid-green): Spray foam vs fiberglass vs cellulose benefits
- [Testimonials](https://sprayliquidgreen.com/testimonials): Customer reviews and case studies
- [Contact](https://sprayliquidgreen.com/contact): Phone, email, address, hours, service area

## Franchise
- [Franchising](https://sprayliquidgreen.com/franchising): Franchise opportunity. $136k–$194k startup, $500k revenue target in 3–5 years, 20-hour training, 1–2 week HQ onboarding, **no prior spray foam experience required**, territories available nationwide, mobile business model, protected territory, CRM included
- [Franchise Kit (PDF)](https://sprayliquidgreen.com/assets/docs/spray-liquid-green-franchise-kit.pdf): 8-page downloadable franchise kit (operations, marketing, training, financials, territory map)
- [Franchise Brochure](https://sprayliquidgreen.com/franchise-brochure): 2-page franchise marketing brochure (Why Join, About Us, Training, Industry Outlook, Contact) — viewable online or downloadable as PDF

## Company Facts
- Legal name: Spray Liquid Green
- Alternate name: Liquid Green Spray Foam Insulation
- Type: HomeAndConstructionBusiness (NY, CT, NJ)
- Franchise areas served: United States (nationwide)
- Actively developing franchise in: New York, Connecticut, Pennsylvania, Florida, Texas
- Founding year: 2010
- Hours: Mon–Fri 7am–6pm, Sat 9am–2pm
- Service area: Tri-state (NY / NJ / CT), Hudson Valley, New England, Mid-Atlantic
- Services: Open cell spray foam, closed cell spray foam, residential insulation, commercial insulation, attic insulation, wall insulation, basement insulation, crawl space insulation, rim joist insulation, roof insulation
- Certifications / ratings: Class 1 fire rating, Class 1 fire-rated building insulation
- Tagline: "Got Foam?"

## Franchise Quick Facts
- Startup investment: $136,000–$194,000 USD
- Target revenue: $500,000 within 3–5 years
- Training: 20 hours classroom + hands-on
- Onboarding: 1–2 week HQ program
- Prior experience: Not required
- Territory model: Protected
- Business model: Mobile (no storefront required)
- Included: CRM, brand guidelines, ongoing operational support, equipment
- Fees: No hidden national advertising costs
- Multi-territory ownership: Available
